message:
feat(tui): wire BOCPD + conformal prediction into tool metrics screen (br-h8xsy)

Per-tool BocpdDetector and ConformalPredictor instances are created
on first tool call. Each latency observation feeds both detectors.
Change-point detections emit AnomalyCards in the dashboard view and
record to the evidence ledger. Table view gains CP and CI(90%) columns.

5 new tests: bocpd_integration, conformal_intervals_displayed,
anomaly_card_emitted, evidence_recorded, per_tool_isolation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
